overall.description: A stationary nighttime view of a busy cyberpunk city street from the video game Cyberpunk 2077. Wet asphalt reflects neon billboards and streetlights as futuristic vehicles continuously pass by in both directions between towering glass buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic cyberpunk downtown street with neon signage

events.description: black futuristic sedan pulls up and stops in the left foreground lane
blue sports car with glowing accents speeds past in the right lane
red compact car stops at the right side of the frame near the barrier

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of traffic flow from a fixed position on the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: black sedan stopped in the foreground lane with headlights on
red car parked or stopped by the concrete barrier on the right

entered.detail: tall illuminated skyscraper with multiple glowing windows rising on the left side of the street
large vertical digital billboard displaying purple and pink neon advertisements on the right building facade
long horizontal LED light fixture mounted on a pole illuminating the street from the left sidewalk
low concrete wall separating the sidewalk from the street on the right side
dark wet road surface reflecting the neon lights and vehicle headlights

segments.scene_description: A static nighttime view of a bustling cyberpunk city street with heavy traffic flow. The camera remains fixed on the sidewalk as futuristic vehicles continuously drive past on the wet asphalt, their headlights and taillights reflecting off the rain-slicked road. Towering glass buildings line both sides, with a prominent purple neon billboard illuminating the right side of the frame while an overhead LED streetlight casts a cool glow from the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, atmospheric perspective of a bustling cyberpunk thoroughfare drenched in nighttime neon. It begins with a fixed view of the sidewalk, where the constant flow of futuristic traffic creates a rhythmic blur of motion across the wet asphalt. As vehicles pass, their headlights and taillights cast shimmering, distorted reflections onto the rain-slicked road. The scene is defined by the interplay of light, with a prominent purple neon billboard illuminating the right side of the frame while a cool glow from an overhead LED streetlight balances the composition from the left. This steady gaze captures the relentless energy of the city, framed by the towering glass buildings that loom over the street.
